---
title: "Object Reference"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

These pages are generated from `specs/dasdae-inventory.yml`.

| Object | Summary |
|---|---|
| [Acquisition](Acquisition.qmd) | Time-aware, channel-like DAS acquisition setup used to resolve acquisition-derived patch metadata. |
| [Cable](Cable.qmd) | Physical cable resource containing one or more fiber segments. |
| [Channel](Channel.qmd) | Station-level time-series stream identity for non-fiber or colocated observations. |
| [Connector](Connector.qmd) | Joined optical interface between components. |
| [CoordinateReferenceSystem](CoordinateReferenceSystem.qmd) | Inventory-wide coordinate reference system used by all coordinate-bearing metadata. |
| [CouplingCondition](CouplingCondition.qmd) | Acoustic coupling condition for an interval of an optical path. |
| [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd) | Physical housing, assembly, pipe, duct, conduit, or carrier resource for optical components or cables. |
| [ExternalResource](ExternalResource.qmd) | External resource identified by DASCore but not otherwise modeled. |
| [FiberArray](FiberArray.qmd) | Durable fiber-optic observing identity anchored by one or more optical paths. |
| [FiberSegment](FiberSegment.qmd) | Length of optical fiber within a cable, patch cord, borehole line, or other run. |
| [Geometry](Geometry.qmd) | Geometry for an interval of an optical path, interpreted using the inventory CRS. |
| [Interrogator](Interrogator.qmd) | DAS interrogator unit used for data collection. |
| [Inventory](Inventory.qmd) | Top-level DASDAE Inventory manifest that stores document metadata, shared resources, and network containers. |
| [Network](Network.qmd) | FDSN-like organizational container below an inventory. |
| [OpticalComponent](OpticalComponent.qmd) | Base class for ordered physical optical components on an optical path. |
| [OpticalPath](OpticalPath.qmd) | Continuous optical path described by independent component, geometry, coupling, and annotation tracks. |
| [OpticalPathAnnotation](OpticalPathAnnotation.qmd) | Named interval on an optical path. |
| [References](References.qmd) | Shareable inventory resources keyed by stable resource_id values. |
| [Response](Response.qmd) | Station-specific response model associated with a channel. |
| [Splice](Splice.qmd) | Fused or mechanical splice between optical fiber segments. |
| [Station](Station.qmd) | Station-level observing identity used to group one or more fiber arrays under a network. |
| [Terminator](Terminator.qmd) | End condition of an optical path. |
